Rimming the Lake District

  • Rimming the Lake District
  • alarmingcod@gmail.com
  • alarmingcod

Rimming the Lake District. A walk around the outer edges of the Lake District National Park in 17 stages. I'm planning to walk these, and make notes starting Summer 26 and into Summer 27
